creator: trasz@FreeBSD.org
text: FWIW, a long time ago I've started the https://reviews.freebsd.org/D30788 to add emulators/linux_base-ubuntu; it might be useful as a starting point.  The main problem, from what I remember, is that most Linux apps we care about, like Steam, are still 32-bit only, and I can't say I understand Ubuntu's idea of handling 32 bit libraries.
